mapper.sql: FROM sys_pay_log spl LEFT JOIN `order` o ON spl.out_trade_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = o.order_no COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN product_order po ON spl.order_id = po.id AND spl.order_type = 1 LEFT JOIN screen_rental_order sro ON spl.order_id = sro.id AND spl.order_type = 2
mapper.select:
SELECT spl.created_at as transactionTime, COALESCE(o.order_no, po.order_no, sro.order_no, spl.out_trade_no, '') as orderNo, CASE spl.status WHEN 1 THEN '收款' WHEN 3 THEN '退款' ELSE '其他' END as type, -- 手续费 CAST(IFNULL( CASE spl.order_type WHEN 1 THEN po.divide_amount WHEN 2 THEN 0 -- 店位订单暂无分账字段 ELSE o.divide_amount END, 0) / 100.0 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as serviceFee, -- 收入/支出 CAST(IFNULL(CASE WHEN spl.status = 1 THEN (spl.total_fee / 100.0) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as income, CAST(IFNULL(CASE WHEN spl.status = 3 THEN (spl.refund_price / 100.0) ELSE 0 END, 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as expense, COALESCE(spl.wx_transaction_no, '') as merchantOrderNo, CASE -- 优先展示退款申请单中的信息 (主要针对商品订单退款) WHEN por.reason IS NOT NULL OR por.audit_remark IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('备注：', IFNULL(por.reason, ''), IF(por.reason IS NOT NULL AND por.audit_remark IS NOT NULL AND por.audit_remark != '', '；', ''), IFNULL(por.audit_remark, '') ) -- 正常订单备注/店位订单自带的驳回原因 ELSE CONCAT('备注：', COALESCE(po.remark, sro.remark, '无')) END as remark
-- 获取商品订单退款原因 LEFT JOIN product_order_refund_apply por ON po.id = por.order_id
ORDER BY spl.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(spl.id) as totalCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN spl.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as incomeCount, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN spl.status = 1 THEN (spl.total_fee / 100.0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as incomeAmount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN spl.status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) as expenseCount, CAST(IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN spl.status = 3 THEN (spl.refund_price / 100.0) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as expenseAmount, -- 汇总手续费 CAST(IFNULL(SUM( CASE spl.order_type WHEN 1 THEN IFNULL(po.divide_amount, 0) WHEN 2 THEN 0 ELSE IFNULL(o.divide_amount, 0) END ) / 100.0, 0) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as totalServiceFee
